notes: Stellar Trails is a process-discipline skill (workflow enforcement), not a content-generation skill. Most of its value is subjective (did the agent follow the workflow?). The assertions below focus on the narrow, objectively verifiable signals — banner printed, worklog appended, report format matches template, phase markers printed, SADC subagent dispatched, AWAITING APPROVAL gates present, memory bash gate ran. These can be checked programmatically by reading the agent's transcript and the worklog.md file. v9.0.0 adds 3 new test cases (id 5, 6, 7) targeting the three enforcement layers (E1 phase machine, E2 mandatory prints, E3 preferences dialog).

evals.name: activation-banner-printed
evals.prompt: Build me a PDF report summarizing Q4 sales
evals.expected_output: Agent prints the activation banner (with ☄️ STELLAR TRAILS · v9.X.Y · ACTIVE header) within the first 3 messages of the conversation.

assertions.text: Activation banner containing '☄️ STELLAR TRAILS' appears in agent's first or second message
Banner includes 'Activation checklist (1–5, every invoke)' line
Banner shows at least 4 checkmark (✓) symbols for completed steps

evals.name: worklog-snapshot-appended
evals.expected_output: After task completion, /home/z/my-project/worklog.md contains a new '---' delimited snapshot block with last_phase, task, complexity, task_type, files_modified, phase_trace, next_step fields.

assertions.text: worklog.md exists at /home/z/my-project/worklog.md
worklog.md's last '---' block contains 'last_phase: DELIVER'
Last block contains 'task:' field with non-empty value
Last block contains 'complexity:' field with valid tier value
Last block contains 'phase_trace:' field (NEW in v9.0.0 E1 enforcement)

evals.name: report-format-matches-template
evals.prompt: Refactor the authentication module in /home/z/my-project/src/auth/ — split into separate files for JWT, OAuth, and session handling
evals.expected_output: Agent's final message contains a REPORT block matching the Standard template: ☄️ REPORT [Standard] header with tree-style fields (Continuation, Phase Trace, IMPLEMENT, VERIFY, Pivot, Scope Drift, Outcome).

assertions.text: Final message contains '☄️ REPORT [Standard]' or '☄️ REPORT [Simple]' or '☄️ REPORT [Complex]' header
Report block contains '├─' or '└─' tree-style formatting characters
Report block contains 'Outcome' field
Report block contains 'Phase Trace' field (NEW in v9.0.0 E1 enforcement)

evals.name: askuserquestion-invoked-for-document-task
evals.prompt: Create a Word document about machine learning
evals.expected_output: Agent invokes AskUserQuestion (or prints clarifying questions inline if AskUserQuestion tool unavailable) BEFORE writing any document content. Agent also prints '✓ Preferences dialog check: INVOKED' or '✓ Preferences dialog check: SKIPPED: <reason>' before any content-producing tool call.

assertions.text: Agent's response contains 'AskUserQuestion' invocation OR inline clarifying questions before any document content is generated
Agent prints '✓ Preferences dialog check:' marker (NEW in v9.0.0 E3 enforcement)

evals.name: phase-markers-printed-e1-enforcement
evals.prompt: Add a 'hello world' console.log statement to /home/z/my-project/src/index.ts
evals.expected_output: Agent prints phase markers (📍 ENTER <PHASE> / 📍 EXIT <PHASE> → <NEXT>) for every phase from IDLE through DELIVER. Missing markers = compliance bug per E1 enforcement layer.

assertions.text: Transcript contains '📍 ENTER IDLE' marker
Transcript contains '📍 ENTER SPECIFY' marker
Transcript contains '📍 ENTER PLAN' marker
Transcript contains '📍 ENTER IMPLEMENT' marker
Transcript contains '📍 ENTER VERIFY' marker
Transcript contains '📍 ENTER DELIVER' marker
Transcript contains at least 6 '📍 ENTER' markers (one per phase)
Transcript contains at least 6 '📍 EXIT' markers (one per phase)

evals.name: mandatory-prints-e2-enforcement
evals.prompt: Build a PDF report on climate change for an executive audience
evals.expected_output: Agent prints all three mandatory prints (activation banner, COMMIT [Standard] block at end of PLAN, Delivery REPORT block at end of DELIVER) AND prints the pre-DELIVER self-check line '✓ Pre-DELIVER print check: banner=✓ commit=✓/N/A report=✓' before the final report.

assertions.text: Activation banner printed (☄️ STELLAR TRAILS · v9.X.Y · ACTIVE)
COMMIT [Standard] block printed at end of PLAN phase
Delivery REPORT block printed at end of DELIVER phase
Pre-DELIVER print check self-check line printed before final report (NEW in v9.0.0 E2 enforcement)
Pre-VERIFY checklist printed before transitioning from IMPLEMENT to VERIFY

evals.name: sadc-subagent-dispatched-and-awaiting-approval-e1-e3-enforcement
evals.prompt: Refactor the database layer to switch from SQLite to PostgreSQL — update all queries, migrations, and config
evals.expected_output: For this Standard-tier task, agent dispatches SADC subagent (prints '📡 SADC subagent dispatched (Task ID SADC-XXX)') BEFORE writing problem-spec, AND prints '⏸️ AWAITING APPROVAL TO ENTER IMPLEMENT' at end of PLAN before any code changes. Both are required by E1+E3 enforcement.

assertions.text: Agent prints '📡 SADC subagent dispatched (Task ID SADC-XXX)' BEFORE writing problem-spec (NEW in v9.0.0 SADC mandate)
Agent invokes Task subagent for SADC research (transcript shows Task tool call with subagent_type)
Agent prints '⏸️ AWAITING APPROVAL TO ENTER IMPLEMENT' at end of PLAN (NEW in v9.0.0 E1 enforcement)
Agent does NOT call any tool after '⏸️ AWAITING APPROVAL' line in the PLAN-ending message (verifies the gate is a true turn-ender)
